heading: Establishment
label: 2321 Establishment
text: There is hereby established in the Department of Agriculture an office to be known as the Plant Variety Protection Office, which shall have the functions set forth in this chapter.
notes: Amendments1980— substituted “an office” for “a bureau”.Pub. L. 96–574

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 91–577, title III, § 14184 Stat. 1558Dec. 24, 1970“This Act [this chapter] shall take effect upon enactment []. Applications may be filed with the Secretary and held by him until the Office of Plant Variety Protection is organized and in operation”.Dec. 24, 1970

Short Title of 1994 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–349, § 1(a)108 Stat. 3136Oct. 6, 1994“This Act [amending sections 2327, 2330, 2353, 2354, 2357, 2401, 2402, 2404, 2422, 2423, 2424, 2425, 2442, 2461, 2462, 2463, 2482, 2483, 2486, 2501, 2504, 2532, 2541, 2542, 2543, 2561, 2566, 2567, 2568, and 2570 of this title, repealing sections 2463, 2502 and 2503 of this title, and enacting provisions set out as notes under ] may be cited as the ‘Plant Variety Protection Act Amendments of 1994’.”section 2401 of this title
